entries.source_evidence:
Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks.
Dispute received fee
₹1,000.00
for each dispute you receive.
In rare cases, network fees also apply.
Dispute countered fee
₹1,000.00
for each dispute you respond to manually.
You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes.

of the disputed amount for each dispute you win.

entries.source_text: Start building your integration and accept your first payment in minutes. Stripe libraries are available in every language from Ruby to Go. Basic usage-based billing features will continue to be available via Stripe's Meters API as part of Billing pricing, with up to 100M events per month included.

Pricing built for businesses of all sizes
section_path: Pricing built for businesses of all sizes

sections.body:
Access a complete payments platform with simple, pay-as-you-go pricing. No setup fees, monthly fees, or hidden fees.
Request an invite
sections.heading: Standard

sections.body: for cards issued in India
for cards issued outside India

For companies scaling revenue or transforming pricing. Tailored pricing for your needs.
Custom pricing
Contact Metronome
sections.heading: Custom
Features available out of the box:
section_path: Features available out of the box:

sections.body:
195 countries
Accept payments around the world with cardholder support in 195+ countries.
135+ currencies
Process charges and display prices in your customer’s preferred currency to increase conversion.
100+ payment methods
From Alipay to iDEAL, seamlessly support popular payment methods.
1 integration
Accept payments globally through a single integration.
sections.heading: Global access

sections.body:
Powerful machine learning
Detect and block fraud using machine learning trained on data across millions of companies.
Adapts to new fraud patterns
Adapt faster to the latest trends with Radar’s machine learning.
No integration required
Get started with zero code thanks to Stripe’s built-in fraud protection.
Fraud analytics
Monitor your fraud performance with advanced analytics and alerting.
sections.heading: Built-in fraud prevention

sections.body:
Flexible UI components
Use UI building blocks to design a secure payments experience that perfectly matches your site.
Pre-built payment forms
Embed a pre-built payments form into your website or direct customers to a Stripe-hosted page.
Accelerated checkout
Autofill your customers’ saved cards to deliver a frictionless checkout experience.
No-code payments
Accept payments in minutes by generating no-code links.
sections.heading: Tools to optimise your checkout

sections.body:
Real-time retries
Increase revenue with selective retries powered by machine learning.
Auto-updated cards
Update card information in real-time, improving customer experience and increasing revenue.
Customer authentication
Verify a customer’s identity using 3D Secure, an authentication method for card transactions
sections.heading: Payments optimisations to boost revenue

sections.body:
Seamless onboarding
Onboard and verify users with conversion-optimised UIs.
Platform management
Manage payment operations with tools for your platform and your users.
Embedded components
Embed and white label payment workflows for your users.
Risk tools
Access tools to help you mitigate risk for your connected accounts.
sections.heading: Embedded payments for platforms & marketplaces

sections.body:
Flexible payout options
Opt to receive transfers on a rolling basis, weekly, or monthly.
Like-for-like settlement
In selected regions, get paid out in your preferred currencies.
Payout transparency
See upcoming payouts, expected deposit dates, payout history, and more in the Dashboard.
sections.heading: Fast, predictable payouts to your bank accounts
section_path: Fast, predictable payouts to your bank accounts

sections.body:
24x7 support
Our team is here to help over email, phone, or chat. You can even get email support in 6 languages.
Industry-leading documentation
Build using our robust technical docs. Sample code in 8+ languages.
Technical support on Discord
Chat to our technical team on the official Stripe Developer Discord server.
sections.heading: Phone, chat, and email support

sections.body:
99.999% average historical uptime
Maximise your revenue with a platform that handles 250 million+ API requests a day, while maintaining 99.999% uptime.
PCI compliant
Use our libraries to collect payment information without sensitive data ever hitting your servers.
Regulatory licences globally
Stripe is certified to the highest industry standards and has obtained regulatory licences around the world.
Standard pricing
Custom pricing

sections.body:
Respond to card payment disputes, also known as chargebacks.
Dispute received fee
₹1,000.00
for each dispute you receive.
In rare cases, network fees also apply.
Dispute countered fee
₹1,000.00
for each dispute you respond to manually.
You get this fee back for won disputes. You don't get this fee back for lost disputes.
sections.heading: Disputes

sections.body:
Respond to disputes with evidence that Stripe's AI prepares for you. You can also add your own evidence. (
public preview)
Smart Disputes fee
30%
of the disputed amount for each dispute you win.
There's no Smart Dispute fee for lost disputes. The dispute received fee still applies.

sections.body:
Stripe charges a per-transaction fee depending on the payment method used by the end customer.
More details on fees by payment method.
sections.heading: How are payment fees calculated?

sections.body:
Stripe is required to charge tax on certain products and services. Tax is charged based on your location and/ or your business/tax status, which determines whether a product or service is subject to taxes, and the applicable tax rates.
Read more
sections.heading: Will I be charged tax?

sections.body:
For businesses on standard pricing: There may be
fees for refunds when bank transfers are used. For all other payment methods, there are no fees for issuing refunds. The payment processing, Connect and currency conversion fees from the original transaction are not returned.
For businesses on custom pricing: There may be fees for issuing refunds depending on your fee schedule with Stripe.
sections.heading: Are there additional fees for refunds?
section_path: Are there additional fees for refunds?

sections.body: Stripe does not charge setup fees, monthly fees, or any other hidden fees like closure fees. All fees for businesses on standard pricing are listed on our website.
sections.heading: Do you have setup fees or monthly fees?
section_path: Do you have setup fees or monthly fees?

sections.body: Stripe offers custom pricing for businesses with large processing volumes. Eligibility varies by market.
sections.heading: Do you offer any discounts?

sections.body: Access a complete payments platform with simple, pay-as-you-go pricing, or contact us to design a custom package specifically for your business.
sections.heading: Ready to get started? Get in touch or create an account.
section_path: Ready to get started? Get in touch or create an account.

sections.body: From startups to Fortune 500s, explore how millions of businesses use Stripe to start and scale their companies.

²
Basic usage-based billing features will continue to be available via Stripe's Meters API as part of Billing pricing, with up to 100M events per month included.
